cases.prompt: Open the site in the browser, test the signup flow, and take a screenshot as evidence.

assertions.text: Uses the fast headless browse daemon to navigate the URL and interact with elements.
Verifies page state through the flow and asserts element states rather than guessing.
Produces annotated screenshots and element states as bug/QA evidence.

cases.prompt: 배포한 사이트 직접 열어서 폼 제출 잘 되는지 도그푸딩하고 스크린샷 찍어줘.

assertions.text: Tests the form/upload flow on the live site and diffs before/after the action.
Can check responsive layouts and handle dialogs as part of dogfooding.
Returns visual evidence (screenshots) of whether the action worked.
